73716.subject: Claude for Small Business: Setup, Workflows, and the Prompts That Make It Work 💼
73716.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/claude-for-small-business-guide

👋 Hey, Linas here! Every day, I break down 3 stories shaping the future of FinTech & Artificial Intelligence - plus the money movements and trends worth tracking. First time here? 385k+ FinTech and AI leaders get this daily. Join them:
Small businesses have always had the ideas. They’ve rarely had the capacity.
And yet they carry the economy. There are 36 million small businesses in the U.S. alone - 99.9% of all firms - contributing 43.5% of GDP and employing 46.5% of the private-sector workforce. Globally, SMEs represent roughly 90% of all businesses and generate up to 70% of both employment and GDP across OECD countries. They are not a footnote to the economy. They are the economy.
Yet for decades, the tools that could change how they operate - real automation, intelligent data analysis, multi-system orchestration - were priced and engineered for enterprises with dedicated IT teams and six-figure software budgets. The owner who handles sales, operations, invoicing, marketing, HR, and customer service simultaneously has never had access to the intelligent support that enterprise teams take for granted.
That gap is exactly what Claude for Small Business [ https://substack.com/redirect/2738983e-3560-4a4b-8b8e-6c720478dc81?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] is built to close.
On May 13, 2026, Anthropic launched it as a plugin for Claude Cowork [ https://substack.com/redirect/22fd5609-f599-429f-b5ac-11f4c16e0e2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] that puts Claude inside the tools your business already runs on: QuickBooks, PayPal, HubSpot, Canva, DocuSign, Slack, Google Workspace, and Microsoft 365.
One toggle. No developer. No API keys. No third-party integration platform required.
What this means in practice: Claude chases your overdue invoices, drafts tone-matched follow-ups based on each client’s payment history, and queues them in Gmail for your approval - all from a single command. It runs a Monday morning business pulse that pulls your cash position, pipeline, and calendar into a one-page brief. It builds a hiring packet - job post, interview guide, offer letter - and routes it through DocuSign. It plans your payroll, flags cash shortfalls, creates Canva assets in your brand colours, and reviews incoming contracts for liability traps.
It does all of this without sending, posting, or paying a single thing without your explicit approval.
The economics are honestly wild: at $20/month for Claude Pro, even a conservative estimate of five recovered hours per week at $50/hour owner-time valuation returns $250 per week against a $20 subscription. The ROI is not marginal at all, but it depends on the setup time you invest upfront. 
This guide was built for this exact reason and covers every single step:
→ What Claude for Small Business actually is
→ How to set it up correctly
→ How t

73715.subject: The 31% drop Google triggered
73715.body:
----------
######                      [Sign Up](http://utm.genai.works/r/gg2ubr5) | [Collaborate with us](https://6hhfxazcbpc.typeform.com/to/uXIl0IFH?utm_source=atlas&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=general_2026_05_11&utm_content=banner_post)


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8776fa6e-e2d0-4aec-9648-1bed6de3a659/GenAI_Daily_Banner.jpg?t=1778687445)
Caption: 


----------

----------
**Welcome back!** Google bundled Gemini, Wiz, Mandiant and CodeMender into one autonomous security platform and the cybersecurity sector lost billions in market cap inside a session. Meta started putting price tags on Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp and Meta AI. Amazon MGM greenlit three AI-assisted animated series with five-week pilot deadlines. OpenAI's non-profit committed $250M to study the labor damage caused by the technology its for-profit sells.

———————————————————————————

**In today's Generative AI Newsletter:**

* **Google:** Why is it a terrible week for cybersecurity companies?

* **Meta:** What does Instagram Plus actually cost you?

* **Amazon MGM:** Which directors are getting AI funds and a five-week deadline?

* **OpenAI Foundation:** Why is the non-profit funding studies on AI job loss?


----------

----------
## [Claude learned to check its own code for vulnerabilities](https://cloud.google.com/blog/products/identity-security/introducing-google-ai-threat-defense)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/dfdcff5a-f1ff-4a5d-9567-87de880670b2/google_ai_threat_defense_1920x1080.png?t=1779958166)
Caption: 

Google Cloud launched Google AI Threat Defense, an always-on platform that fuses Gemini, Wiz, CodeMender and Mandiant into a single stack. 

And it just happens that Zscaler dropped 31%, CrowdStrike fell 3.4%, Palo Alto Networks lost 3% and the First Trust Cybersecurity ETF closed down 2.7%.

**The details:**

* Gemini handles reasoning, Wiz maps live exposure across cloud and code, CodeMender writes patches inside the developer's IDE, Mandiant supplies the response playbooks.

* No single frontier model finds every vulnerability, so AI Threat Defense routes the heaviest scans to internet-facing apps and authentication logic.

* CodeMender generates the fix and the verification tests automatically before anything ships.

* Zscaler’s 31% drop also tracked an earnings cut and a below-consensus FY27 guide released the night before Google's keynote.

* Accenture, Deloitte, PwC and Netenrich will deploy and manage the platform for enterprise customers.

The exploit window has collapsed from weeks to hours and security teams cannot keep up by hand. The price the market put on that capability is whatever Zscaler, CrowdStrike and Palo Alto can no longer charge for the same work.


----------

------

73701.subject: SoFi, Cash App, Mastercard: Business in Front, Blockchain in Back
73701.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

These were our top news today:

* **[SoFi](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/sofi-brings-its-bank-issued-stablecoin-to-14-7-million-members)**[ rolls out bank-issued stablecoin](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/sofi-brings-its-bank-issued-stablecoin-to-14-7-million-members)

* **[Mastercard](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/mastercard-wins-ny-bitlicense-deepening-push-into-stablecoin-settlement)**[ wins NY BitLicense](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/mastercard-wins-ny-bitlicense-deepening-push-into-stablecoin-settlement)

* [Cash App adds fee-free USDC transfers](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/cash-app-goes-live-with-fee-free-usdc-transfers-framing-stablecoins-as-a-path-to-bitcoin)

* **[DTCC](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/dtcc-picks-stellar-for-tokenized-securities-rollout-as-multi-chain-push-expands)**[ picks Stellar for tokenized securities](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/dtcc-picks-stellar-for-tokenized-securities-rollout-as-multi-chain-push-expands)

* **[OpenZeppelin](https://thedefiant.io/news/hacks/openzeppelin-pushes-back-after-ex-cto-declares-all-of-defi-unsafe)**[ pushes back on ex-CTO](https://thedefiant.io/news/hacks/openzeppelin-pushes-back-after-ex-cto-declares-all-of-defi-unsafe)

Ethereum's soul-searching, the hype around HYPE, and BTC's price aside, the biggest story in the blockchain industry continues to be stablecoins. Today's headlines proved it, with three major fintech and payment players rolling out digital-dollar infrastructure.

Stablecoins are coming to mom-and-pop, whether they know it or not. Just today, SoFi opened SoFiUSD to its 14.7 million app members — the first time a US bank-issued stablecoin has been available within a consumer banking interface; Mastercard secured a New York BitLicense, signaling it's taking meaningful steps to settle payments onchain; and Cash App began rolling out USDC to its ~50 million users.

What's still TBD is how these players will position their product to fit the [Clarity Act's specific design](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/latest-clarity-act-draft-bans-rewards-on-passive-stablecoin-balances): the current draft bans rewards "economically equivalent to interest" on passive stablecoin balances and explicitly allows activity-based rewards. Consumer fintechs will have to fill that gap with cashback, usage rebates, and merchant-funded promotions.

Different strategies are already taking shape. PayPal issued PYUSD with Paxos and went the cross-chain, merchant-and-developer route, [crossing $4 billion in supply by February](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/paypal-pyusd-supply-crosses-usd4-billion). SoFi is taking the bank-charter route: vertical integration, consumer-first deployment, FDIC-adjacent positioning. 

Stripe is playing a different game entirely: infrastructure. After acquiring stablecoin orchestration firm Bridge for $1.

73694.subject: New Claude Plugin, Mention in chats, and Editor Updates
73694.body:
Hey, it's Zeno.

We just dropped our official Claude Code Plugin https://resend.com/changelog/resend-claude-code-plugin to better support agentic development, improved our email editor experience, and have launched our design newsletter https://resend.com/savour.

Before we start, a quick question:

> What friction are you facing when using Resend?

We read every answer. Just hit reply.





OFFICIAL CLAUDE CODE PLUGIN

https://resend.com/changelog/resend-claude-code-plugin

Our official Claude Code plugin includes skills for creating React Emails, sending and receiving with Resend, agent inbox setup, and more. The plugin also includes the Resend MCP server built-in.

→ Read the changelog https://resend.com/changelog/resend-claude-code-plugin





@MENTION YOUR EMAILS

https://resend.com/changelog/mentions-in-ai-chats

When building automations, broadcasts, or templates, reference other templates in AI chats to reference your existing content, design, or layouts.

→ Check the changelog https://resend.com/changelog/mentions-in-ai-chats





VISUALIZE YOUR DATA

https://resend.com/changelog/chart-component

Data is easier to understand when it's visual. That's why we've added a new Chart component to the email editor, available in both Broadcasts https://resend.com/features/broadcasts and Templates https://resend.com/features/templates.

You can now embed bar, line, and area charts directly in your emails.

→ Read the changelog https://resend.com/changelog/chart-component





THE POWER OF TEMPLATES

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bULq0GWXU0o

If your API calls are still sending raw HTML or React Email inline, you're missing out. Resend templates give you a visual editor, version history, variables, and zero-deploy updates, all without touching your codebase. Here's everything you need to know.

→ Watch the video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bULq0GWXU0o





WHY THE TAILWIND TEAM CHOSE RESEND

https://resend.com/customers/tailwind

What started as a CSS framework has grown into a small family of products. In Tailwind's words, "Resend is the modern email service built for developers who value speed, support, and DX."

→ Read their story https://resend.com/customers/tailwind





READY FOR AUTH0

https://resend.com/changelog/auth0-integration

Crucial emails, like verification codes, password resets, and more, need to be delivered to inboxes quickly and reliably. With the Resend connector, you can start sending these emails in just a few minutes.

→ Check the changelog https://resend.com/changelog/auth0-integration





RESEND'S DESIGN TEAM NEWSLETTER IS HERE

https://resend.com/savour

A newsletter by the design team at Resend on taste, craft, and the details that make great products. Subscribe to receive each edition in your email inbox.

→ Subscribe to Savour https://resend.com/savour




Happy sending,
Zeno Rocha

----------------------------
